*捐款凭证/Donation vouchers*
请提交您的捐款证明 Please submit your donation vouchers.
*捐款渠道/Donation channels*
请选择您的捐款渠道（Sponsor按键、升级Slack、升级Github）Please select your donation channel (Sponsor button, upgrade Slack, upgrade Github)
*捐款奖励/Donation rewards*
请提交您的奖励（捐款人民币（元）数x25）Please submit your reward (number of donations in CNY (Yuan) x 25)
